heading: A complete journey
in three
languages.
lead: An end-to-end programme for patients arriving from abroad — from pre-op consultation to post-op follow-up.

items.title: Video pre-op consultation
items.desc: Plan the procedure, review imaging and discuss risk before you travel.

items.title: Welcome & coordination
items.desc: Airport transfer, accommodation and clinic visits handled by one team.

items.title: On-site interpreter
items.desc: English- and German-speaking interpreters accompany every consultation.
